verses.2: “Dominion and awe belong to God; He establishes harmony in the heights of heaven.
verses.3: Can His troops be numbered? On whom does His light not rise?
verses.4: How then can a man be just before God? How can one born of woman be pure?
verses.5: If even the moon does not shine, and the stars are not pure in His sight,
verses.6: how much less man, who is but a maggot, and the son of man, who is but a worm!”

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
